documentation: Curated public records for non-airline aircraft commonly associated with the Oakland / East Bay area.
Used to label live ADS-B matches (OpenSky). Not a complete fleet list; equipment notes cite journalism, OEM specs, or agency disclosures.
Aircraft rows may include callsign (exact ADS-B match), icao24, or nNumber.
Cell-site simulator (StingRay) references describe historical or shared county agreements — not live detection.

aircraft.label: Oakland Police heli
aircraft.notes: OPD air unit; frequently circled protests per local reporting.

aircraft.label: Oakland Police heli
aircraft.notes: Second OPD ship; observed over San Leandro / Oakland protest routes.

aircraft.label: East Bay Regional Parks police heli

aircraft.notes: Seen over Oakland during 2020 protest coverage.

technologyNotes.summary: Oakland PD retired its own 2G-era StingRay in 2013; a 2016 MOU allowed limited access to an Alameda County DA cell-site simulator for search/rescue and fugitive cases (Vice / public records). This is not detectable via ADS-B.
